节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the applications of the enterprise devices.
注释信息: @namespace applicationManager
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@since 10

节点.功能描述: Add appid list of bundles that is disallowed to run in the device. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. cannot be greater than 200. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_MANAGE_SET_APP_RUNNING_POLICY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { Array<string> } appIds - ids of the bundle are disallowed to run. The size of the array after setting
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of addDisallowedRunningBundles.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@StageModelOnly
@since 10

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
ids of the bundle are disallowed to run. The size of the array after setting
the callback of addDisallowedRunningBundles.
